title: Primordium Weapons
description:
A weapons mod with handmade models I'm making which I HOPE is balanced.

Find primordium get strong weapons that don't break.

Useful for RPG modpacks.
body:
![primordium weapons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aceeff55f16040d5608ec4de0211572cd9de4aa.png)

 You can look at the images if you want to see what some of the stuff from my mod looks like!

⚔️A bunch of Weapons to Wage war on your enemies, or fun combat with friends⚔️
- 
 AS OF PRIMORDIUM WEAPONS 1.8.0 FOR 1.20.1 IT NOW REQUIRES GECKOLIB!!


🪨COMPATIBLE WITH ORCA'S JUJUTSUCRAFT FOR 1.16.5 AND 1.20.1🪨

⚔️ MADE TO WORK WITH BETTER COMBAT! ⚔️

 
![Better combat Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d65cbe745229c36b7b97cb608926374724d8174.png)

[Better combat port for 1.16.5 (Incase you don't know where to find it)](https://moddingtutorials.org/better-combat)

 BETTER COMBAT FOR THE 1.18.2 AND 1.20.1 VERSIONS CAN BE FOUND ON HERE ON MODRINTH!


In order to be played on servers it needs to be installed on both Client and Server.
